name: Grotesquerie

next_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
next_episode_to_air.overview: Lois accepts the help of a specialist.

overview: A series of heinous crimes have unsettled a small community and Detective Lois Tryon feels these crimes are eerily personal, as if someone—or something—is taunting her. With no leads and unsure of where to turn, she accepts the help of journalist nun Sister Megan. As the two string together clues, they find themselves ensnared in a sinister web that only seems to raise more questions than answers.
